summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked, instant/low-signal closeout is disabled, and several open PRs need maintainer or author follow-up rather than closure.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling and not used for backlog cleanup decisions.
Already closed; no action beyond recording that the closed PR is superseded by the live catalog approach.
Useful independent PR that should remain open for maintainer review; merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Related to a live issue and potentially useful, but failing checks make it maintainer/author follow-up rather than a closure or merge candidate.
Draft maintainer-owned PR should remain open for author/maintainer follow-up, not cleanup closure.
Session-state PR is related to nearby work but has unique scope and should remain open.
Feature PR with active proof/review requirements should remain open as related channel work.
Maintainer-owned fix PR should remain open for requested review; merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Related overlapping memory fix remains open but should not be auto-closed from this shard.
Draft bug PR has useful evidence but is not safe to close or merge; keep it related for maintainer/author follow-up.
Large contributor locale PR should remain open for review/follow-up; it is not a cleanup close candidate.
